name: Sphere of Fleeting Shadow
description:
A Nod-Krai kuuvahki sphere mechanism, capable of playing music and producing dazzling light effects. It is a souvenir brought back from Nod-Krai by the Teapot Traveling Salesman, Chubby.
Even a glimpse of the shifting lights cast by the sphere brings faint images to mind, which you can manipulate through the power of Sub-Space Creation to recreate the wondrous landscapes of Nod-Krai in your Realm Within...
